reviews.comment:
Pasamos al baño muy limpio solo ahí dos inodoros y raro el local cerrado queríamos agua y caramelos para el viaje y cerrado

(Translated by Google)
We went to the bathroom, which was very clean, but there were only two toilets. Oddly, the place was closed; we wanted water and candy for our trip, and it was closed.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención del personal. Allí nos informaron qué la ruta 40 en el tramo que íbamos a recorrer estaba intransitable. Nos indicaron cómo era el desvío que debíamos tomar para evitarla.

(Translated by Google)
The staff was very attentive. They informed us that Route 40 was impassable along the stretch we were about to travel. They told us which detour we should take to avoid it.

reviewReply.comment: Nos complace haber sido utiles, gracias.
